description: Medical office cleaning across 296 MA cities. HIPAA-aware, CDC protocols, 5 rated. $2M insured. Free quote: (978) 307-8107
aiSummary: Dory's Cleaning Services Inc. is a Massachusetts-based commercial healthcare facility cleaning company with more than 22 years of hands-on clinical experience. We serve 296 cities across Massachusetts, providing CDC and OSHA compliant environmental cleaning for medical offices, specialty clinics (cardiology, dental, urgent care, dialysis), ambulatory and outpatient facilities, surgery centers, rehabilitation and nursing facilities, assisted living, and healthcare administrative offices. Founded by Jeneva Thomas, MA HIC License #213341, $2,000,000 liability insurance. Services include infection control, ATP testing, terminal cleaning, COVID disinfection, biohazard cleanup, and 24/7 emergency response. Contact: (978) 307-8107 — based in Marlborough, MA 01752.

schemas.name: Medical Offices
schemas.description: Specialized sanitation for medical offices, dental practices, and physician clinics across Massachusetts. Infection control protocols, EPA-registered disinfectants, and compliance documentation.

mainEntity.name: What does medical office cleaning from Dory's include?

acceptedAnswer.text: Our medical office cleaning service includes clinical-grade surface disinfection, exam room turnover sanitation, waiting area and reception cleaning, restroom sanitation, hard floor care, high-touch point disinfection (door handles, light switches, check-in counters), medical waste area maintenance, and detailed compliance documentation for every visit.

mainEntity.name: How often should a medical office be professionally cleaned?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most medical offices require daily cleaning to maintain infection control standards and patient safety. High-traffic practices such as urgent care or multi-provider offices may benefit from twice-daily service. Dory's works with your practice manager to build a frequency schedule that matches patient volume, office hours, and regulatory requirements.

mainEntity.name: What compliance standards does Dory's follow for medical office cleaning?

acceptedAnswer.text: Dory's follows OSHA Bloodborne Pathogens Standard, CDC environmental infection control guidelines, EPA-registered disinfectant protocols, and Massachusetts Department of Public Health regulations. Our staff are trained in proper PPE use, chemical handling, and cross-contamination prevention specific to clinical environments.

mainEntity.name: Why should a medical practice choose Dory's over a general janitorial company?

acceptedAnswer.text: Dory's exclusively serves licensed healthcare facilities across Massachusetts. Unlike general janitorial companies, our protocols are designed specifically for clinical environments where infection prevention, OSHA compliance, and patient safety are non-negotiable. With over 22 years of healthcare cleaning experience, our trained staff understand exam room turnover, biohazard handling, and the documentation your practice needs for regulatory compliance.

Professional Medical Office Sanitation

Medical Offices Sanitation in Massachusetts

Specialized sanitation for medical offices, dental practices, and physician clinics across Massachusetts. Infection control protocols, EPA-registered disinfectants, and compliance documentation.

Call (978) 307-8107 Schedule Assessment

Dory's Cleaning Services provides specialized medical office cleaning throughout Massachusetts. With 22 years of hands-on clinical experience, we understand that clinical environments demand more than standard cleaning — they require trained professionals who follow CDC and OSHA guidelines.

Our medical office cleaning team uses EPA-registered hospital-grade disinfectants with verified contact times, follows terminal environmental cleaning protocols for exam rooms, and delivers documented results that support your facility's compliance requirements.

We offer flexible scheduling including after-hours and weekend service to ensure zero disruption to your patient flow. Every cleaning is documented with verification logs available for regulatory audits and internal quality reviews.

Service Details

What's Included

  • EPA-Registered Hospital-Grade Disinfection
  • Exam Room Terminal Cleaning
  • Waiting Area & Reception Sanitization
  • Restroom Medical-Grade Disinfection
  • Biohazard-Aware Waste Handling
  • HVAC Vent & Air Quality Maintenance
  • Medical Equipment Surface Disinfection
  • Floor Care with Healthcare-Grade Solutions

Ideal For

Physician Offices Dental Practices Dermatology Clinics Podiatry Offices Chiropractic Clinics Optometry Practices

Frequently Asked Questions About Medical Office Cleaning

Common questions from practice managers and medical office administrators.

Our medical office cleaning service includes clinical-grade surface disinfection, exam room turnover sanitation, waiting area and reception cleaning, restroom sanitation, hard floor care, high-touch point disinfection (door handles, light switches, check-in counters), medical waste area maintenance, and detailed compliance documentation for every visit.

Most medical offices require daily cleaning to maintain infection control standards and patient safety. High-traffic practices such as urgent care or multi-provider offices may benefit from twice-daily service. Dory's works with your practice manager to build a frequency schedule that matches patient volume, office hours, and regulatory requirements.

Dory's follows OSHA Bloodborne Pathogens Standard, CDC environmental infection control guidelines, EPA-registered disinfectant protocols, and Massachusetts Department of Public Health regulations. Our staff are trained in proper PPE use, chemical handling, and cross-contamination prevention specific to clinical environments.

Dory's exclusively serves licensed healthcare facilities across Massachusetts. Unlike general janitorial companies, our protocols are designed specifically for clinical environments where infection prevention, OSHA compliance, and patient safety are non-negotiable. With over 22 years of healthcare cleaning experience, our trained staff understand exam room turnover, biohazard handling, and the documentation your practice needs for regulatory compliance.
